d: Bonnie fires magic arrows, dealing [[180%]]<ATK> damage to each enemy twice. The magic arrow deals [[30%]] more damage to enemies afflicted by Aging and stuns them for [[3]]s.

When a battle starts, Bonnie casts the Aging magic on the rearmost enemy, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and reducing their Haste by [[30]] until the battle ends. Bonnie prioritizes attacking this target afflicted by Aging.
Whenever an allied hero deals magic damage to the enemy afflicted by Aging, the effect is further enhanced, reducing their Haste by an extra [[10]]. Each ally can only trigger the enhancement once, and the Aging magic can be enhanced up to [[2]] times. Once the Aging effect reaches its maximum stack, the afflicted enemy suffers a [[30%]] reduction in their ATK and takes [[100%]]<ATK> damage every [[1]]s.

Bonnie transforms into a black mist, moving to a safe spot within [[4]] tiles and firing [[6]] arrows, each dealing [[35%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy. While in black mist form, Bonnie is [[invincible]].
When Aging reaches its maximum stack or an Aged enemy is defeated, the effect spreads to the nearest [[1]] unafflicted enemy, dealing [[260%]]<ATK> damage to each.
Increases the damage dealt by the spread of Aging to [[270%]]<ATK>.
When Aging reaches its maximum stack or an Aged enemy is defeated, the effect spreads to [[2]] unafflicted enemies.
Increases the damage dealt by the spread of Aging to [[280%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: When the Aging effect reaches its maximum stack on an enemy, their magic damage taken is increased by [[10%]], with an extra [[20%]] increase for magic damage taken from Ultimates.
